---
title: "Steering Committee"
toc: false
---

### Leadership:

-   Luke Fostvedt (Past ASA co-chair)
-   Tim Waterhouse (Past ISoP co-chair)
-   Monica Simeoni (ISoP co-chair)
-   Kosalaram (Ram) Goteti (ASA co-chair)
-   Matt Fidler (Education Lead)
-   Curtis Johnston (Communications Lead)

### Members:

-   Alice Zong
-   Camille Vong
-   Jiang Liu
-   Jie Cong
-   Julie Bertrand
-   Laura Zwep
-   Marion Kerioui
-   Mita Kuchimanchi
-   Phyllis Chan
-   Souvik Bhattacharya
-   Yi Zhang
-   Yuan Xiong
-   Akash Khandelwal
-   Chuanpu Hu
-   Akiyuki Suzuki
-   Steve Denham
